song.title: His Name is Wonderful
song.lyrics: [V1] 1) His Name is Wonderful, His name is Wonderful, His Name is Wonderful, Jesus my Lord.|| He is the mighty King, Master of everything, His name is Wonderful, Jesus my Lord.|| He’s the Great Shepherd, the Rock of all Ages, Almighty God is He, Bow down before Him,|| Love and adore Him, His Name is Wonderful, Jesus my Lord.
song.author: Audrey Mieir
